channel.title: Long Shorts on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Long Shorts on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: The Llama
The Banana Dealer
Segments
item.description: I - Parakeet I looked down from my tree and saw a large, furry animal feeding upon the remains of a smaller but equally furry animal. At first I felt sickened but quickly mastered the urge. “Nature must run it’s course,” I declared. “Cobblers!” the green and red parakeet I shared my perch with exclaimed Silence enveloped us once more and we watched the red sun sink slowly beyond the distant horizon.
